faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hadgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hadgarh Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hadgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (126 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (123 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hadgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hadgarh Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hadgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Hadgarh Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hadgarh Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Bangura, India.
